examples.title: Algorithm: Distributed System
examples.code:
ALGORITHM Distributed System
INPUT: nodes, network
OUTPUT: synchronized shared ledger

BEGIN
 Initialize nodes
 Establish network connections
 WHILE TRUE
 Broadcast transactions
 Validate transactions
 Update local ledger
 Synchronize with other nodes
 END WHILE
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates a basic distributed system where nodes communicate and synchronize their local ledgers.

examples.title: Python: Blockchain Node
examples.explanation: This Python code implements a basic blockchain node with a genesis block and the ability to add new blocks.

examples.title: Java: Distributed System
examples.explanation: This Java code demonstrates a basic distributed system where nodes communicate and receive transactions.
